fight-club.title: Fight Club
fight-club.desc: An insomniac office worker and a carefree soap salesman form an underground fight club that evolves into something much, much more dangerous.

american-psycho.title: American Psycho
american-psycho.desc: A wealthy New York investment banking executive hides his alternate psychopathic ego from his co-workers and friends as he delves deeper into his violent, hedonistic fantasies.

tumbbad.title: Tumbbad
tumbbad.desc: A mythological story set across multiple decades following one family's obsession with a cursed treasure and the ancient god Hastar.

shawshank-redemption.title: The Shawshank Redemption
shawshank-redemption.desc: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

requiem-for-a-dream.title: Requiem for a Dream
requiem-for-a-dream.desc: The drug-induced utopias of four Coney Island people are shattered when their addictions run deep.

oldboy.title: Oldboy
oldboy.desc: After being imprisoned for fifteen years without explanation, Oh Dae-su is released only to find he must find his captor in five days.

midsommar.title: Midsommar
midsommar.desc: A couple travels to Sweden to visit a rural hometown's fabled midsummer festival, which quickly devolves into an increasingly disturbing folk nightmare.

blade-runner-2049.title: Blade Runner 2049
blade-runner-2049.desc: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, missing for thirty years.

mother.title: Mother!
mother.desc: A couple's relationship is tested when uninvited guests arrive at their home, disrupting their tranquil existence.

a-tale-of-two-sisters.title: A Tale of Two Sisters
a-tale-of-two-sisters.desc: After returning home from a psychiatric hospital, two sisters are haunted by the tragedies that hang over their family.
